title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed with any model served by Ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node and browsers to interact with the Ollama API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama models for chains, agents and retrieval.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat interface, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI wrapper with fuzzy search, conversation history and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot chat sidebar.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + ChromaDB + Streamlit to chat with documents.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & CUDA) published to Docker Hub with multi-arch support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs with POJO mapping.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in production pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed request/response models and IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that streams Ollama replies in threads with slash commands and model picker.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app exposing Ollama as a slash command and direct-message chatbot with rate limiting.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts inside notes and insert generated text via templates.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package providing JavaScript/TypeScript bindings for the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: Official PyPI package for Python developers to chat, generate and embed with Ollama models.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate offering strongly-typed wrappers over Ollama endpoints with tokio streaming.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library generated from OpenAPI specs for Ollama services.
